untranslatable_reason: EEDT pattern detection requires geometric shape analysis (equidistant droplines, expanding triangle formation) which cannot be expressed with standard technical indicators. Support proximity detection for pullback avoidance requires pattern-level support identification not available in provided indicators. Author provides success rates as AUTHOR_SILENT, limiting quantifiable exit rules.
translation_notes: Signal is pattern-recognition based and requires visual/geometric analysis. Used pivot points and support/resistance levels as proxy for support detection. Bull pullback: 62%, Bear pullback: 51% mentioned but no actionable threshold provided. Average pullback duration of 11 days used for hold_days_max. Breakout direction is BOTH, so both long and short entries included. Stop loss set conservatively at 3% given pullback risk context.
